sections.paragraph:
Original: נשׂג

Transliteration: nâśag

Phonetic: naw-sag'

BDB Definition:

  1. to reach, overtake, take hold upon
    1. (Hiphil)
      1. to overtake
      2. to reach, attain to, cause to reach
      3. to be able to secure, reach, have enough

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1422

Part(s) of speech: Verb
